title: post api auth signup valid registration
description: Test user registration with valid email, password, and optional name. Expect 201 response with user id, email, and name.

title: post api auth signup missing or invalid password
description: Test user registration with missing or invalid password. Expect 400 response with password validation error.

title: post api auth signup duplicate email registration
description: Test user registration with an email that is already registered. Expect 409 response with duplicate email error.

title: get api projects authenticated user projects list
description: Test retrieving projects list for authenticated user. Expect 200 response with projects array ordered by most recently updated.

title: get api projects unauthorized access
description: Test retrieving projects list without authentication. Expect 401 Unauthorized error.

title: post api projects create new project valid spec
description: Test creating a new project with valid name and OpenAPI spec content. Expect 201 response with project id, name, and path count.

title: post api projects create project missing name
description: Test creating a new project with missing project name. Expect 400 error indicating project name is required.

title: get api projects id retrieve project details
description: Test retrieving project details by id for owner user. Expect 200 response with project details including mappings and config.

title: patch api projects id update project name
description: Test updating project name with valid new name. Expect 200 response with updated project name and updatedAt timestamp.

title: delete api projects id delete project
description: Test deleting a project by id for owner user. Expect 200 response with confirmation message.
